### Post by joto on 2007-12-08
&#4331;&#4304;&#4314;&#4312;&#4304;&#4316; &#4313;&#4304;&#4320;&#4306;&#4312; &#4322;&#4317;&#4318;&#4312;&#4313;&#4312; &#4312;&#4327;&#4317; &#4306;&#4304;&#4334;&#4321;&#4316;&#4312;&#4314;&#4312; &#4304;&#4325; david-mac-&#4312;&#4321; &#4315;&#4312;&#4308;&#4320;, &#4320;&#4317;&#4315;&#4308;&#4314;&#4312;&#4330; &#4315;&#4308; &#4315;&#4304;&#4320;&#4311;&#4314;&#4304; &#4306;&#4304;&#4315;&#4317;&#4317;&#4315;&#4304;&#4307;&#4306;&#4304;:) &#4323;&#4305;&#4320;&#4304;&#4314;&#4317;&#4307; &#4315;&#4312;&#4316;&#4307;&#4304; &#4321;&#4334;&#4309;&#4308;&#4305;&#4321; &#4306;&#4304;&#4309;&#4323;&#4310;&#4312;&#4304;&#4320;&#4317; &#4329;&#4308;&#4315;&#4312; &#4306;&#4304;&#4315;&#4317;&#4330;&#4307;&#4312;&#4314;&#4308;&#4305;&#4304;. &#4307;&#4304;&#4327;&#4308;&#4316;&#4308;&#4305;&#4312;&#4311; &#4307;&#4304;&#4309;&#4304;&#4327;&#4308;&#4316;&#4308; &#4309;&#4308;&#4305; &#4321;&#4308;&#4320;&#4309;&#4308;&#4320;&#4312;, &#4315;&#4304;&#4306;&#4320;&#4304;&#4315; &#4332;&#4304;&#4309;&#4304;&#4332;&#4327;&#4307;&#4312; &#4318;&#4320;&#4317;&#4305;&#4314;&#4308;&#4315;&#4304;&#4321;, &#4309;&#4308;&#4320; &#4309;&#4312;&#4327;&#4308;&#4316;&#4308;&#4305;&#4307;&#4312; &#4310;&#4308;&#4315;&#4317;&#4311;&#4334;&#4321;&#4308;&#4316;&#4308;&#4305;&#4323;&#4314; &#4321;&#4308;&#4320;&#4309;&#4308;&#4320;&#4321;. &#4304;&#4314;&#4312;&#4316;&#4323;&#4325;&#4321;&#4312; &#4320;&#4304;&#4315;&#4307;&#4308;&#4316;&#4335;&#4308;&#4320;&#4315;&#4308; &#4307;&#4304;&#4309;&#4312;&#4334;&#4315;&#4304;&#4320;&#4308;, &#4329;&#4308;&#4315;&#4312; &#4318;&#4320;&#4317;&#4305;&#4314;&#4308;&#4315;&#4304; &#4309;&#4308;&#4320; &#4306;&#4304;&#4307;&#4304;&#4309;&#4308;&#4330;&#4312; &#4312;&#4321;&#4308;, &#4320;&#4317;&#4315; &#4315;&#4304;&#4321; &#4306;&#4304;&#4308;&#4306;&#4317;, &#4311;&#4323; &#4320;&#4304; &#4315;&#4312;&#4316;&#4307;&#4317;&#4307;&#4304;... &#4315;&#4317;&#4313;&#4314;&#4308;&#4307; &#4321;&#4304;&#4325;&#4315;&#4308; &#4318;&#4317;&#4320;&#4322;&#4308;&#4305;&#4312;&#4321; &#4306;&#4304;&#4307;&#4304;&#4315;&#4312;&#4321;&#4304;&#4315;&#4304;&#4320;&#4311;&#4308;&#4305;&#4304;&#4328;&#4312; &#4304;&#4326;&#4315;&#4317;&#4329;&#4316;&#4307;&#4304;... &#4329;&#4308;&#4315;&#4312; &#4321;&#4322;&#4304;&#4322;&#4312;&#4313;&#4323;&#4320;&#4312; IP &#4315;&#4308; &#4315;&#4325;&#4317;&#4316;&#4307;&#4304;, &#4323;&#4305;&#4320;&#4304;&#4314;&#4317;&#4307;, &#4304;&#4320; &#4315;&#4325;&#4317;&#4316;&#4307;&#4304; &#4318;&#4317;&#4320;&#4322;&#4312; &#4306;&#4304;&#4332;&#4308;&#4320;&#4312;&#4314;&#4312; &#4328;&#4308;&#4321;&#4304;&#4305;&#4304;&#4315;&#4312;&#4321; &#4324;&#4304;&#4312;&#4314;&#4328;&#4312;, &#4308;&#4321; &#4313;&#4312;, &#4331;&#4304;&#4314;&#4312;&#4304;&#4316; &#4315;&#4304;&#4320;&#4322;&#4312;&#4309;&#4312; &#4304;&#4326;&#4315;&#4317;&#4329;&#4316;&#4307;&#4304;:) &#4328;&#4308;&#4312;&#4331;&#4314;&#4308;&#4305;&#4304; &#4305;&#4308;&#4309;&#4320;&#4312; &#4321;&#4304;&#4320;&#4306;&#4308;&#4305;&#4314;&#4317;&#4305;&#4321; &#4313;&#4304;&#4323;&#4313;&#4304;&#4310;&#4323;&#4321; &#4317;&#4316;&#4314;&#4304;&#4312;&#4316;&#4312;&#4321; &#4318;&#4320;&#4317;&#4309;&#4304;&#4312;&#4307;&#4308;&#4320;&#4312;&#4311;, &#4315;&#4308;-80-&#4308; &#4318;&#4317;&#4320;&#4322;&#4312; &#4307;&#4304;&#4305;&#4314;&#4317;&#4313;&#4312;&#4314;&#4312;&#4304;, &#4312;&#4321; &#4323;&#4316;&#4307;&#4304; &#4328;&#4308;&#4312;&#4330;&#4309;&#4304;&#4314;&#4317;&#4321; 8080 &#4318;&#4317;&#4320;&#4322;&#4312;&#4311;, &#4320;&#4317;&#4315;&#4308;&#4314;&#4312;&#4330; &#4315;&#4312;&#4321;&#4312; &#4304;&#4314;&#4322;&#4308;&#4320;&#4316;&#4304;&#4322;&#4312;&#4323;&#4314;&#4312;&#4304;. &#4323;&#4305;&#4320;&#4304;&#4314;&#4317;&#4307; &#4328;&#4308;&#4309;&#4307;&#4312;&#4309;&#4304;&#4320;&#4311; ```
gedit /etc/apache2/ports.conf
``` &#4324;&#4304;&#4312;&#4314;&#4328;&#4312;, &#4312;&#4325; &#4309;&#4330;&#4309;&#4314;&#4312;&#4311; listen 80-&#4321; listen 8080-&#4312;&#4311;, &#4307;&#4304; &#4327;&#4309;&#4308;&#4314;&#4304;&#4324;&#4308;&#4320;&#4312; &#4312;&#4315;&#4323;&#4328;&#4304;&#4309;&#4308;&#4305;&#4321;:)
&#4321;&#4323;&#4314; &#4308;&#4321;&#4304;&#4304;, &#4332;&#4304;&#4320;&#4315;&#4304;&#4322;&#4308;&#4305;&#4308;&#4305;&#4312;

### Post by jimbob on 2007-12-08

### Post by joto on 2007-12-09
> **jimbob said:**
> If you could possibly translate this to English I think responses would be more likely..
I speak English very bad, so I mean, that alinux can to translate my post from Georgia, into English...
This post, about ports, it must change in the file- ports.conf. For exemple, I had port number listen 80 in that file, but now, I changed it look like this
zuzu@zuzu:~$ cat /etc/apache2/ports.conf
Listen 8080

<IfModule mod_ssl.c>
    Listen 443
</IfModule>

```

&#4313;&#4304;&#4320;&#4306;&#4312; &#4312;&#4325;&#4316;&#4308;&#4305;&#4304;, david-mac-&#4312;&#4321; HOWTO &#4320;&#4317;&#4315; &#4306;&#4304;&#4307;&#4304;&#4332;&#4308;&#4320;&#4317;... &#4307;&#4304; &#4328;&#4308;&#4316;&#4312;
&#4316;&#4304;&#4332;&#4309;&#4304;&#4314;&#4308;&#4305;&#4312;&#4330; &#4307;&#4304;&#4304;&#4315;&#4304;&#4322;&#4317;...&#4307;&#4304; &#4306;&#4304;&#4316;&#4304;&#4309;&#4320;&#4330;&#4317; &#4307;&#4304; &#4313;&#4312;&#4307;&#4308;&#4309; &#4323;&#4324;&#4320;&#4317; &#4307;&#4304;&#4332;&#4309;&#4320;&#4312;&#4314;&#4308;&#4305;&#4312;&#4311; &#4307;&#4304;&#4332;&#4308;&#4320;&#4317; ...&#4320;&#4304; &#4307;&#4304; &#4320;&#4317;&#4306;&#4317;&#4320;. &#4313;&#4304;&#4320;&#4306;&#4312; &#4316;&#4304;&#4315;&#4323;&#4328;&#4308;&#4309;&#4304;&#4320;&#4312; &#4311;&#4323; &#4306;&#4304;&#4315;&#4317;&#4309;&#4304;, &#4315;&#4312;&#4309;&#4318;&#4312;&#4316;&#4304;&#4309;&#4311;!

&#4316;&#4304;&#4332;&#4309;&#4304;&#4314;&#4308;&#4305;&#4312;&#4330; &#4307;&#4304;&#4304;&#4315;&#4304;&#4322;&#4317;...&#4307;&#4304; &#4306;&#4304;&#4316;&#4304;&#4309;&#4320;&#4330;&#4317; &#4307;&#4304; &#4313;&#4312;&#4307;&#4308;&#4309; &#4323;&#4324;&#4320;&#4317; &#4307;&#4304;&#4332;&#4309;&#4320;&#4312;&#4314;&#4308;&#4305;&#4312;&#4311; &#4307;&#4304;&#4332;&#4308;&#4320;&#4317; ...&#4320;&#4304; &#4307;&#4304; &#4320;&#4317;&#4306;&#4317;&#4320;. &#4313;&#4304;&#4320;&#4306;&#4312; &#4316;&#4304;&#4315;&#4323;&#4328;&#4308;&#4309;&#4304;&#4320;&#4312; &#4311;&#4323; &#4306;&#4304;&#4315;&#4317;&#4309;&#4304;, &#4315;&#4312;&#4309;&#4318;&#4312;&#4316;&#4304;&#4309;&#4311;!

&#4320;&#4304;&#4321; &#4312;&#4322;&#4327;&#4309;&#4312; ?
David-mac-&#4321; &#4320;&#4304;&#4330; &#4323;&#4332;&#4308;&#4320;&#4312;&#4304;, &#4327;&#4309;&#4308;&#4314;&#4304;&#4324;&#4308;&#4320;&#4312; &#4331;&#4304;&#4314;&#4312;&#4304;&#4316; &#4306;&#4304;&#4321;&#4304;&#4306;&#4308;&#4305;&#4304;&#4307; &#4307;&#4304; &#4313;&#4304;&#4320;&#4306;&#4304;&#4307; &#4304;&#4325;&#4309;&#4321; &#4304;&#4326;&#4332;&#4308;&#4320;&#4312;&#4314;&#4312;, &#4315;&#4308; &#4320;&#4304;&#4326;&#4304; &#4307;&#4304;&#4309;&#4304;&#4315;&#4304;&#4322;&#4317;:) &#4315;&#4308; &#4314;&#4317;&#4313;&#4304;&#4314;&#4323;&#4320;&#4312; &#4318;&#4320;&#4317;&#4305;&#4314;&#4308;&#4315;&#4304; &#4315;&#4325;&#4317;&#4316;&#4307;&#4304;, &#4318;&#4317;&#4320;&#4322;&#4308;&#4305;&#4312;&#4321; &#4306;&#4304;&#4307;&#4304;&#4315;&#4312;&#4321;&#4304;&#4315;&#4304;&#4320;&#4311;&#4308;&#4305;&#4304;&#4321;&#4311;&#4304;&#4316; &#4307;&#4304;&#4313;&#4304;&#4309;&#4328;&#4312;&#4320;&#4308;&#4305;&#4312;&#4311;, &#4320;&#4304;&#4321;&#4304;&#4330; &#4305;&#4317;&#4314;&#4317;-&#4305;&#4317;&#4314;&#4317; &#4306;&#4304;&#4309;&#4323;&#4306;&#4308; &#4315;&#4323;&#4326;&#4304;&#4315;&#4312;... &#4318;&#4320;&#4312;&#4316;&#4330;&#4312;&#4318;&#4328;&#4312;, &#4313;&#4304;&#4320;&#4306;&#4312; &#4312;&#4325;&#4316;&#4308;&#4305;&#4304; &#4314;&#4304;&#4307;&#4317;, &#4304;&#4315; &#4311;&#4308;&#4315;&#4304;&#4321; &#4311;&#4323; &#4315;&#4312;&#4323;&#4308;&#4320;&#4311;&#4308;&#4305; david-&#4312;&#4321; &#4311;&#4308;&#4315;&#4304;&#4321; &#4307;&#4304; &#4304;&#4318;&#4312;&#4316;&#4304;&#4309;... LAMP &#4314;&#4312;&#4316;&#4323;&#4325;&#4321;&#4312;&#4321; &#4315;&#4311;&#4304;&#4309;&#4304;&#4320;&#4312; &#4313;&#4317;&#4310;&#4312;&#4320;&#4312;&#4304; &#4307;&#4304; &#4323;&#4320;&#4312;&#4306;&#4317; &#4304;&#4320; &#4312;&#4325;&#4316;&#4308;&#4305;&#4304; &#4311;&#4323; &#4312;&#4321; &#4315;&#4311;&#4304;&#4309;&#4304;&#4320;&#4312; &#4311;&#4308;&#4315;&#4304; &#4312;&#4325;&#4316;&#4308;&#4305;&#4304;, &#4304;&#4318;&#4312;&#4316;&#4323;&#4314;&#4312;. &#4328;&#4308;&#4316;&#4312; &#4304;&#4318;&#4312;&#4316;&#4323;&#4314;&#4312; &#4311;&#4308;&#4315;&#4304; &#4331;&#4304;&#4314;&#4312;&#4304;&#4316; &#4318;&#4320;&#4304;&#4325;&#4322;&#4312;&#4313;&#4323;&#4314;&#4312;&#4304;, &#4334;&#4328;&#4312;&#4320;&#4304;&#4307; &#4312;&#4321;&#4315;&#4312;&#4321; &#4308;&#4306; &#4313;&#4312;&#4311;&#4334;&#4309;&#4304;, &#4311;&#4323; &#4320;&#4317;&#4306;&#4317;&#4320; &#4329;&#4304;&#4320;&#4311;&#4317;&#4316; &#4309;&#4312;&#4316;&#4307;&#4317;&#4323;&#4321;&#4312;, &#4320;&#4317;&#4330;&#4304; &#4306;&#4320;&#4304;&#4305;&#4312; &#4307;&#4304;&#4310;&#4312;&#4304;&#4316;&#4308;&#4305;&#4323;&#4314;&#4312;&#4304;. &#4315;&#4317;&#4313;&#4314;&#4308;&#4307; &#4323;&#4304;&#4315;&#4320;&#4304;&#4309;&#4312; &#4307;&#4308;&#4322;&#4304;&#4314;&#4312;&#4304;, &#4320;&#4304;&#4330; &#4307;&#4304;&#4315;&#4332;&#4327;&#4308;&#4305;&#4321; (&#4307;&#4304; &#4304;&#4320;&#4304; &#4315;&#4334;&#4317;&#4314;&#4317;&#4307; &#4315;&#4304;&#4321;) &#4328;&#4308;&#4312;&#4331;&#4314;&#4308;&#4305;&#4304; &#4328;&#4308;&#4308;&#4315;&#4311;&#4334;&#4309;&#4308;&#4321;, &#4306;&#4310;&#4304; &#4307;&#4304; &#4306;&#4310;&#4304; &#4315;&#4308;&#4330; &#4307;&#4304;&#4309;&#4332;&#4308;&#4320;, &#4311;&#4323; &#4320;&#4304;&#4315;&#4308;&#4321; &#4306;&#4304;&#4309;&#4312;&#4306;&#4308;&#4305;, &#4321;&#4334;&#4309;&#4304;&#4330; &#4307;&#4304;&#4332;&#4308;&#4320;&#4321; &#4307;&#4304; &#4308;&#4321;&#4308; &#4328;&#4308;&#4312;&#4309;&#4321;&#4308;&#4305;&#4304;.
